item.description: About Currently an enthusiastic Learner and an aspiring Data Analyst. Studying Bsc at Statistics at Shahjalal University of Science and Technology, Sylhet. Also, working as a Research assistant at Shahjalal University of science and technology, Content Creator at Youtube and a part-time Data Analyst freelancer on fiverr. These works really encourages me and enables me to gain more experience and also learning many new things related to Statistics and Statistical Data Analysis.

Projects Relationships among Occupational Stress, Professional Burnout and Depressive Symptoms of public and private University teachers in Sylhet. The purpose of the study is to find out the relationships among occupational stress, professional burnout, and depressive symptoms, of public private university teachers in Sylhet, Bangladesh. This research will help us to identify and recommend policy and practices to avoid occupational stress, professional burnout and depression of the teachers.

Publications Impact of weather on COVID-19 transmission in South Asian Countries: an application of the ARIMAX model. Oct 16, 2020 - Science of Total Environment Summary: We aimed to examine the impact of weather on COVID-19 confirmed cases in South Asian countries, namely, Afghanistan, Bangladesh, India, Pakistan, and Sri Lanka. Data on daily confirmed cases, together with weather parameters, were collected from the first day of COVID confirmed cases in each country to 31 August 2020.
